South Korea's highest-paid math tutor makes $14 million a year, more than Son Heung-min, their most famous footballer. His name is Hyun Woo-jin. He graduated from Stanford's math department in three years and three months. His textbook series, Neuron, sells over a million copies a year. Every November, South Korea pauses for a single nine-hour exam called the Suneung. The Air Force halts training flights. For 35 minutes during the English listening section, no commercial flights can take off or land at Incheon, one of Asia's busiest airports. About 8,000 police officers escort late students on motorcycles with sirens running. Inside that exam, the most consequential questions are called killer questions. They're deliberately designed to fall outside the public school curriculum. They exist to separate the top one percent from everyone else, because that one percent gets into Seoul National, Korea, and Yonsei. The SKY universities that produce around 30% of Korea's top-1,000-company CEOs. Parents can't evaluate the curriculum themselves. They can't reverse-engineer the killer question. So they borrow Hyun Woo-jin's judgment. If your child went through Neuron and still failed, you did what every reasonable parent in the neighborhood does. The fault is your child's, or fate's. Not yours. That's what's actually being sold. Not math. Certainty. Korean households spent 29.2 trillion won on private tutoring in 2024, an all-time record, even as the school-age population dropped another 1.5%. A country is, in a measurable sense, choosing not to exist in order to keep paying for that certainty.

都内唯一の屋台ラーメン🍜 ◆チャーシュー麺 (¥950) [トッピング] 味玉 (¥100) 玉ねぎ (¥50) 海苔 (¥50) ほうれん草 (¥100) 八王子にある都内で唯一の屋台ラーメン！ 都心から離れているのに行列のできる人気店 日本ならではの屋台ラーメンは趣のある雰囲気と一度食べたら忘れられない味 カウンター席とテーブル席があるがカウンター席は予約することも可能。(詳しくはお店のアカウントをチェック) ≪店舗詳細≫ 【店舗名】屋台ラーメン しゅんやっちゃん 【住所】東京都八王子市初沢町1277-8  【営業時間】18:00〜23:00 【定休日】月曜・日曜   #東京グルメ #八王子グルメ #屋台ラーメン   ====================================   Tokyo’s Only Yatai Ramen Stand in the City 🍜 ◆ Chashu Ramen (¥950) [Toppings] Ajitama Egg (¥100) Onion (¥50) Nori Seaweed (¥50) Spinach (¥100) A one-of-a-kind yatai-style ramen stand in Tokyo, located in Hachioji! Even though it’s far from central Tokyo, people line up for this incredibly popular spot. This traditional Japanese street-style ramen offers a nostalgic atmosphere and an unforgettable flavor you’ll keep craving. There are both counter and table seats available, and you can even reserve the counter seats in advance. Respuesta a @Veronica Estética Y no se me confundan con los Polis (PHAs); ellos son hidrosolubles pero de molécula gigante, por eso son tan amigables con las pieles sensibles. 한 그릇만 주문해도, 커다란 양푼에서 바로 만들어주는 의정부 비빔국수 📍의정부제일시장 '영선네 잔치국수' (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 서52호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢비빔국수 8천원 의정부 제일시장의 오랜 내공이 담긴 국수 맛집, '영선네'입니다. ​이곳의 인기 비결은 주문 즉시 커다란 양푼에서 사장님이 직접 손맛으로 무쳐주시는 비빔국수입니다. 한자리에서만 무려 20년 동안 변함없는 맛을 이어온 진정한 노포 국수 맛집으로, ​매일 아침부터 점심시간까지는 든든하게 한 끼 식사를 해결하러 오시는 손님들로 발 디딜 틈이 없습니다. ​아삭아삭한 식감의 콩나물이 듬뿍 올라간 비빔국수와 사장님이 직접 정성껏 담그신 열무김치의 조합은 그야말로 일품인데요🤤 입맛 당기는 매콤새콤한 비빔국수를 좋아하시는 분들이라면 꼭 한번 방문해 보세요! - Made in a Giant Mixing Bowl! The Legendary 20-Year Hand-Mixed Spicy Noodles 📍 Yeong-seonne Noodles, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢 Spicy Mixed Noodles (Bibim-guksu): 8,000 KRW Welcome to 'Yeong-seonne,' a noodle spot in Uijeongbu Jeil Market with years of expertise. The secret to its popularity is the spicy mixed noodles, hand-tossed by the owner in a giant mixing bowl (Yangpun) immediately after ordering. It’s a true hidden gem that has maintained the same delicious taste in the same spot for over 20 years. From early morning through lunch, it’s always packed with locals looking for a hearty meal. The combination of spicy noodles topped with crunchy bean sprouts and homemade young summer radish kimchi (Yeolmu-kimchi) is simply superb! 🤤 If you love mouth-watering, sweet, and spicy noodles, this is a must-visit spot! #서울맛집 #의정부맛집 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

Vitamin C plays a vital role in supporting the immune system through multiple mechanisms. As a potent water-soluble antioxidant, it helps neutralize harmful free radicals and protects immune cells from oxidative stress during infections. It is essential for the production, function, and movement of various white blood cells, including neutrophils, lymphocytes, and phagocytes, enhancing their ability to fight pathogens. Vitamin C also promotes the synthesis of collagen, strengthening the skin and mucous membranes as a first line of defense against invaders, and supports the production of antibodies and cytokines that coordinate immune responses. While it won’t necessarily prevent colds in well-nourished people, regular adequate intake (from foods like citrus fruits, berries, peppers, and broccoli, or supplements when needed) can reduce the duration and severity of respiratory infections and help the body recover more effectively. #funny #fyp #me #meme #fypシ

매일 새벽 손으로 직접 만드는 수제만두, 젊은 사장님에게서 느껴지는 '할머니의 손맛' 📍망원 연만두  (주소: 서울 마포구 망원로 77 1층 연만두)   🔗네이버 지도: https://naver.me/5Kb3ejlY   🥟만두 한 판 8,500원 / 왕치즈군만두 1개 2,500원   📦택배 신청: 매주 월요일 오후 5시까지 문자 접수 (연락처: 010-5941- 7816)   망원시장의 소문난 만두 맛집 '연만두'. 많은 분이 연세 지긋한 할머니가 운영하실 거라 오해할 만큼 깊은 손맛을 자랑하는 곳입니다. 하지만 이곳의 주인공은 만두에 인생을 건 젊은 사장님이었는데요.  그 깊은 맛의 비결은 진심어린 정성에 있었습니다.  "기계는 재료를 뭉개버린다"는 철학 아래, 매일 새벽부터 나와 모든 재료를 일일이 손으로 버무리고 직접 빚으시더라구요. 재료 하나하나의 식감이 살아있는 꽉 찬 만두 속은 그렇게 사장님의 고집으로 완성됩니다.  워낙 정성껏 소량만 준비하기 때문에 금세 품절되기로 유명한데요. 방문 전 전화 주문이나 네이버 예약을 이용하시면 헛걸음 없이 바로 가져가실 수 있으니 꼭 참고하세요!   주문 즉시 튀겨주시는 치즈 군만두는 갓 튀겨낸 바삭한 식감 속에 고소하게 늘어나는 치즈와 만두 속의 조화가 그야말로 환상적입니다.. 정성과 맛, 어느 하나 빠지지 않는 망원동의 진정한 인생 만두를 만나보세요!   - Deep flavor hand-mixed every dawn: Finding 'Grandmother's Touch' in a Young Master 📍망원 연만두 'Yeon-Mandu' (77, Mangwon-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea)   🔗 https://maps.app.goo.gl/jDhS1Q11mVTn1mBA9   'Yeon-Mandu' is a renowned dumpling spot near Mangwon Market, famous for a deep, traditional flavor that leads many to assume an elderly grandmother must be running the shop. Surprisingly, the true master behind these dumplings is a young man who has dedicated his life to this craft.   The secret to such profound flavor lies in his sincere devotion. Following his philosophy that "machines crush the ingredients' texture," he starts his day in the early hours of the dawn, hand-mixing and folding every single dumpling. This stubborn commitment is what creates the perfect filling, where the texture of each ingredient remains intact and vibrant.   Because each dumpling is made with such meticulous care in limited quantities, they are famous for selling out quickly. We highly recommend placing a phone order or using Naver Reservation before your visit to ensure you don't miss out!  Don't miss the Cheese Fried Dumplings, fried to order for a perfectly crispy texture. The harmony of the savory, melting cheese and the rich dumpling filling is simply heavenly. Come and experience a true "life-changing" dumpling in Mangwon-dong, where passion and tradition meet! 🥟 #서울맛집 #망원동 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

눈 오는 날 동대문 포장마차에서 먹는 즉석 짬뽕 한 그릇 눈발 날리는 동대문 먹거리장터, 포장마차 천막 안으로 들어갔습니다 아침마다 직접 반죽하고 숙성시킨 면을 주문받으면 그 자리에서 바로 뽑아주십니다 홍합을 아낌없이 넣어야 국물이 시원하다며 건네주신 짬뽕 한 그릇 사모님이 직접 담그신 김치 한 젓가락 올려 호호 불며 먹으니 얼었던 몸이 스르르 풀립니다 [동대문 먹거리장터 유진짬뽕] 📍 위치 서울 종로구 종로40길 6 (동대문역 9번 출구 도보 3분) ⏰ 영업시간 월~토 오전 10시 30분 - 오후 10시 매주 일요일 정기휴무 ※ 재료 소진 시 조기 마감 🎞️ 영상 속 메뉴 즉석 짬뽕 ₩8,000 ※ 촬영일 기준, 가격 변동 가능 - A Bowl of Fresh-made Jjamppong at a Dongdaemun Street Stall on a Snowy Day With snow flurrying in the air, I stepped into a street stall tent at Dongdaemun Meokgeori Market Every morning, they knead and rest the dough, then pull fresh noodles to order right on the spot A generous handful of mussels makes the broth refreshing and tasty, said the owner as he handed me a bowl I topped it with a bite of kimchi the owner's wife made herself, blew on it, and my frozen body melted away [Dongdaemun Meokgeori Market Yujin Jjamppong] 📍 Location 6 Jongno 40-gil, Jongno-gu, Seoul, South Korea (3-min walk from Dongdaemun Station Exit 9) ⏰ Opening Hours Mon-Sat 10:30 AM - 10 PM Closed every Sunday ※ May close early when ingredients run out 🎞️ Featured in the video Fresh-made Jjamppong ₩8,000 ※ Price as of filming date, subject to change #tiktokfood #koreanfood #streetfood #mukjja

Chicken Tortilla Wrap 🌮 Chicken thighs marinated in paprika, dried garlic, dried onion, salt, pepper and olive oil. Leave for at least 30 minutes, then cook until golden. Add cheddar and mozzarella to the tortilla and cook on a pan from both sides until the cheese melts. Sauce: mayo, jalapeños, jalapeño juice, lime juice, paprika, dried garlic and dried onion. Slice the chicken into small pieces and add into the cheesy tortilla with the sauce 🤍 Tortilla con Pollo 🌮 Muslos de pollo marinados con pimentón, ajo seco, cebolla seca, sal, pimienta y aceite de oliva. Dejar marinar mínimo 30 minutos y cocinar hasta dorar. Agregar cheddar y mozzarella a la tortilla y cocinar en la sartén por ambos lados hasta que el queso se derrita. Salsa: mayonesa, jalapeños, jugo de jalapeños, jugo de lima, pimentón, ajo seco y cebolla seca. Raising Cane’s-Style Chicken Fingers With Cane’s Sauce. Ingredients: For the Chicken: - 2 lb chicken breast, cut into strips - Oil for frying For the Wet Batter: - 2 cups buttermilk - 2 tbsp garlic powder - 1 tbsp black pepper - Salt to taste - 1 tbsp smoked paprika For the Dry Batter: - 2 cups all-purpose flour - 3 tbsp cornstarch - Salt to taste - 1 tbsp garlic powder - 1 tsp black pepper - 1 tsp smoked paprika For the Cane’s Sauce: - 1 cup mayonnaise - 4 tbsp ketchup - 2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce - 1 tbsp garlic powder - 1 tsp black pepper - Salt to taste - 1 tsp smoked paprika Instructions: 1. Prepare the wet batter by whisking together buttermilk, garlic powder, black pepper, salt, and smoked paprika. Add the chicken strips to the wet batter and marinate for at least 2 hours or overnight. 2. Prepare the dry batter by whisking together flour, cornstarch, salt, garlic powder, black pepper, and smoked paprika. 3. Remove the chicken from the wet batter, allowing excess to drip off, then coat each strip in the dry batter. 4. Deep-fry the coated chicken strips in hot oil (about 350°F) until golden brown and cooked through, approximately 8-10 minutes, flipping halfway through. 5. Prepare the Cane’s Sauce by whisking together mayonnaise, ketchup,Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, black pepper, salt, and smoked paprika. 6. Serve the crispy chicken fingers with Cane’s Sauce. #canessauce #raisingcanes #friedchicken #chickentenders #Recipe
